svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 640 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <style>
      @keyframes pulse1 {
        0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
        50% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes pulse2 {
        0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.7; }
        50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes pulse3 {
        0%, 100% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 1; }
        50% { transform: scale(0.9); opacity: 0.6; }
      }
      @keyframes wave1 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
      }
      @keyframes wave2 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-12px); }
      }
      @keyframes wave3 {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
        50% { transform: translateY(-6px); }
      }
      @keyframes float {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); }
        25% { transform: translateY(-5px) rotate(2deg); }
        75% { transform: translateY(3px) rotate(-2deg); }
      }
      @keyframes ripple {
        0% { r: 8; opacity: 0.9; }
        100% { r: 25; opacity: 0; }
      }
      @keyframes flowLine {
        0%, 100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
        50% { stroke-dashoffset: 20; }
      }
      @keyframes beat {
        0%, 20%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
        10% { transform: scale(1.15); }
      }
      .note-dot { transform-origin: center; }
      .note1 { animation: pulse1 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .note2 { animation: pulse2 1.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.2s; }
      .note3 { animation: pulse3 1.8s ease-in-out infinite 0.4s; }
      .wave-group1 { animation: wave1 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .wave-group2 { animation: wave2 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 0.3s; }
      .wave-group3 { animation: wave3 1.8s ease-in-out infinite 0.6s; }
      .float-element { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .ripple-ring { animation: ripple 2s ease-out infinite; transform-origin: center; }
      .ripple-ring2 { animation: ripple 2s ease-out infinite 0.5s; transform-origin: center; }
      .ripple-ring3 { animation: ripple 2s ease-out infinite 1s; transform-origin: center; }
      .flow-line { stroke-dasharray: 10 5; animation: flowLine 3s linear infinite; }
      .beat-element { animation: beat 0.8s ease-in-out infinite; transform-origin: center; }
    </style>
    
    <!-- Gradient for flowing waves -->
    <linearGradient id="waveGrad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E63946" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#F77F00" stop-opacity="0.8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F4A261" stop-opacity="0.6"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <linearGradient id="waveGrad2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#457B9D" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#2A9D8F" stop-opacity="0.7"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9B5DE5" stop-opacity="0.5"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <radialGradient id="pulseGrad" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9B5DE5" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#9B5DE5" stop-opacity="0.3"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="640" height="200" fill="#FFFEF5"/>
  
  <!-- Flowing Sound Wave - Back Layer -->
  <g class="wave-group1">
    <path d="M0 120 Q40 100, 80 120 T160 120 T240 120 T320 120 T400 120 T480 120 T560 120 T640 120" 
          fill="none" stroke="url(#waveGrad2)" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="wave-group2">
    <path d="M0 100 Q50 75, 100 100 T200 100 T300 100 T400 100 T500 100 T600 100" 
          fill="none" stroke="url(#waveGrad1)" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Rhythmic Pulse Center - Heartbeat -->
  <g transform="translate(320, 100)">
    <circle class="ripple-ring" cx="0" cy="0" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#E63946" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle class="ripple-ring2" cx="0" cy="0" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#F77F00" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle class="ripple-ring3" cx="0" cy="0" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle class="beat-element" cx="0" cy="0" r="12" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Musical Note Dots - Left Cluster (Slow Tempo) -->
  <g class="float-element" transform="translate(80, 70)">
    <circle class="note-dot note1" cx="0" cy="0" r="8" fill="#457B9D"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note2" cx="25" cy="15" r="5" fill="#2A9D8F"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note3" cx="12" cy="35" r="6" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.8"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Musical Note Dots - Right Cluster (Fast Tempo) -->
  <g transform="translate(520, 60)">
    <circle class="note-dot note1" cx="0" cy="0" r="6" fill="#F77F00"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note2" cx="18" cy="8" r="4" fill="#E63946"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note3" cx="10" cy="25" r="5" fill="#F4A261"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note1" cx="30" cy="18" r="3" fill="#9B5DE5" style="animation-delay: 0.3s;"/>
    <circle class="note-dot note2" cx="40" cy="5" r="4" fill="#2A9D8F" style="animation-delay: 0.5s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Dancing Curves - Swirling Motion -->
  <g class="wave-group3">
    <path d="M150 140 Q180 110, 210 140 Q240 170, 270 140" 
          fill="none" stroke="#2A9D8F" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" class="flow-line"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="wave-group1" style="animation-delay: 0.8s;">
    <path d="M400 150 Q430 120, 460 150 Q490 180, 520 150" 
          fill="none" stroke="#9B5DE5" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" class="flow-line"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Confetti Rhythm - Scattered with Pattern -->
  <g class="float-element" style="animation-delay: 0.2s;">
    <circle cx="45" cy="45" r="3" fill="#F4A261" class="note-dot note2"/>
    <circle cx="595" cy="155" r="3" fill="#457B9D" class="note-dot note1"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="float-element" style="animation-delay: 0.7s;">
    <circle cx="180" cy="165" r="2.5" fill="#E63946" class="note-dot note3"/>
    <circle cx="460" cy="45" r="2.5" fill="#2A9D8F" class="note-dot note2"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Flowing Lead Lines (Caming) -->
  <path d="M0 160 Q160 140, 320 160 Q480 180, 640 160" 
        fill="none" stroke="#457B9D" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.35"/>
  
  <path d="M0 40 Q160 60, 320 40 Q480 20, 640 40" 
        fill="none" stroke="#F4A261" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.3"/>
  
  <!-- Accent Beats -->
  <g transform="translate(220, 85)">
    <circle class="beat-element" cx="0" cy="0" r="7" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.85" style="animation-delay: 0.4s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <g transform="translate(420, 115)">
    <circle class="beat-element" cx="0" cy="0" r="9" fill="#457B9D" opacity="0.8" style="animation-delay: 0.2s;"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Subtle Background Rhythm Markers -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="130" r="2" fill="#9B5DE5" opacity="0.4" class="note-dot note3"/>
  <circle cx="540" cy="90" r="2" fill="#E63946" opacity="0.4" class="note-dot note1"/>
  <circle cx="280" cy="50" r="1.5" fill="#2A9D8F" opacity="0.5" class="note-dot note2"/>
  <circle cx="380" cy="170" r="1.5" fill="#F77F00" opacity="0.5" class="note-dot note3"/>
  
</svg>
description: This abstract composition visualizes celebratory music through layered rhythmic elements - pulsing circles radiate like a heartbeat from the center, while flowing wave forms undulate like sound frequencies across the canvas. Scattered dot clusters represent musical notes dancing at different tempos, with the left side playing a slower, spacious melody and the right side bursting with faster, denser rhythms. The generous negative space serves as musical rests, allowing each animated beat to breathe and resonate.
